pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty— 1.1052 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fused Triton/CUTLASS MLP kernels with precomputed grads, expanded 3.5× MLP, Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 quantization, and a fast sparse causal n-gram tilt.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward and CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels with branch-free activation gradients
Hessian-ranked mixed int5/int6 quantization to fit a wider MLP under 16MB
Fast sparse auxiliary-memory n-gram tilt serving subword certainty during evaluation
